Edge-cropped, partial view of a narrow beige wardrobe-like object covered in floral-patterned fabric with large stylized flowers; white metal support bars are visible near the top and the item appears to lean against a wall, with cloth-like texture and uneven lighting — approximately 1.0 m from the camera.

Open white wardrobe interior with a horizontal hanging rod holding multiple garments (striped, teal leaf-print, blue and patterned fabrics) and a small stack of off-white cushions on top; the view is partial and edge-cropped, showing fabric textures and the open closet face — estimated ~1.2 m from the camera.

Off-white/cream rectangular fabric pillow (appears as the upper of a stacked pair) with visible seam and slight fraying along the lower edge; pillow looks flattened/soft and is partially cropped by the image border — close-up view approximately 0.5 m from the camera.

Vertical gray-and-white terry towel draped over a rail, occupying most of the crop and partially cut off at the top and right edges; lower edge appears bunched and slightly frayed with visible looped texture; appears to be about 0.6 m from the camera.
